title: v1pe's Capitalized Font
description: A patch to qrafty's capitalized font to add support for Nordic and other european alphabets
body:
I made this for myself as I wanted to be able to use [qrafty's Capitalized Font](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/qraftys-capitalized-font) while typing in my native language, so I decided to extend it to a couple more languages, and decided to release it here

Use this on top of qrafty's capitalized font resource pack for the best experience

---

### Alphabets supported:
- 🇳🇴 Norway
- 🇸🇪 Sweden
- 🇩🇰 Denmark
- 🇫🇮 Finland
- 🇮🇸 Iceland
- 🇫🇴 Faroe Islands
- 🇪🇪 Estonia
- 🇩🇪 Germany
- 🇪🇸 Spain
---

### Alphabets i hope to support later
- 🇱🇹 Lithuania
- 🇱🇻 Latvia
- 🇵🇱 Poland
- 🇨🇿 Czechia
- 🇸🇰 Slovakia
